case_title: SANCHEZ, FRANCISCO vs. HALL, WILFRED OWEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, WILFRED OWEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-01-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-30-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-14-2000

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON AUG-08-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT SELVIDGE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-23-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SELVIDGE ROBERT. HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY BELDON YEE. (212)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-30-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-30-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO CCP 583.250 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 583.210. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
